title: Falling into Water 掉进水里
scene: Max在河边玩耍时不小心掉进水里，大喊救命。

lines.en: Help! Help! I fell in the water!
lines.zh: 救命！救命！我掉进水里了！

lines.en: Max! Stay calm! Try to hold on to that branch!
lines.zh: Max！冷静！尽量抓住那根树枝！

lines.en: I am trying! The water is so cold!
Do not splash around. Stay still and float on your back.
lines.zh: 不要乱扑腾。保持不动，仰面漂浮。

lines.en: I can not touch the bottom. It is deep!
Kick your legs gently toward the shore.
I am kicking! I am moving closer!
That is it! Keep going. I will reach my hand out.
lines.zh: 对！继续。我伸手过来拉你。

lines.en: Got your hand! Pull me up!
lines.zh: 抓住你的手了！拉我上去！

lines.en: You are safe now. Let me get you a towel.
lines.zh: 你现在安全了。我去给你拿毛巾。
